scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client,worker -c green,cyan,yellow "npm --workspace server run dev" "npm --workspace client run dev" "npm --workspace server run worker:email"
scripts.dev:server: concurrently -k -n server,worker -c green,yellow "npm --workspace server run dev" "npm --workspace server run worker:email"
scripts.build: npm --workspace server run build || true && npm --workspace client run build
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n server,client,worker -c green,cyan,yellow "npm --workspace server run start" "npm --workspace client run start" "npm --workspace server run worker:email"
scripts.lint: npm --workspace server run lint || true && npm --workspace client run lint || true
